## Discover Canada through geography

The Atlas of Canada provides interactive and static maps of Canada, from past to present.

## Key Features

- **Interactive Maps** - Dynamic maps with multiple thematic layers
- **Historical Archive** - Digitized atlas editions from 1906 onwards
- **Educational Resources** - Teaching materials and data for geography curriculum

## Learn More

Explore the full Atlas of Canada:

[Visit the Atlas of Canada →](https://natural-resources.canada.ca/maps-tools-publications/maps/atlas-canada)
